title: Backports for v1.6.4
body:
We're looking to cut a 1.6.4 including a fresh c/storage version with Valentin's patches for RHEL/Cent 8.2. These are the backports we want for that branch.

This is NOT targetted against master and is NOT our next master release - this is a separate one for RHEL.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.6/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
(This is doubly confusing because we are ALSO cutting v1.7.0 on the master branch)
